description_long: This rifle features a robust, angular body with a predominantly dark green and black color scheme accented by red highlights. The stock is thick and solid, designed for stability, and the grip is ergonomic with a pronounced trigger guard. The barrel is long and slender, extending well beyond the main body, suggesting a design optimized for precision and range. A large scope is mounted on the top rail, indicating the rifle is intended for long-distance targeting. The magazine is a detachable box type, positioned just in front of the trigger. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, giving it a modern, tactical appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern, tactical rifle with a long barrel, large scope, and detachable box magazine, finished in dark green, black, and red accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile of the barrel and scope, with the muzzle and front sight visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the rifle, the scope, the ergonomic grip, and the detachable box magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid stock and the alignment of the scope and barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with more detail on the stock and magazine area.
